notes: Raw observations only; window classification belongs to the /boss-study authoring step. 'ammo' reads are authoritative only on settled/static samples (rolling digits blur and misread). counter ticks ~30/s hot; small kit refills (+5-ish) move the counter WITHOUT a firing pause. INVERTED state = the reload display (dark 000 on bright). faces = UNCALIBRATED v0 cover metric (baseline 5-8 on normal frames -> likely DEAD; do not treat its absolute value as meaningful).
